reviews.comment:
Es el lugar ideal para estirar las piernas y cargar combustible!! A mitad del camino entre Trelew y Comodoro Rivadavia, los sanitarios estan en condiciones y limpios!! Que suerte contar con esa parada, gracias gracias a los dueños o consecionarios!!

(Translated by Google)
It's the perfect place to stretch your legs and refuel! Halfway between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia, the restrooms are clean and in good condition! How lucky we are to have this stop; thank you so much to the owners or concessionaires!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHX2JQU1ZnEAE
